title: tenant.created payload (v1)
description: Emitted when a new tenant is created. Producer: tenant-service (apps/tenant-service/src/routes/tenants.ts). PLATFORM-SCOPED: the subject is `platform.tenant.created` (NOT tenant-scoped) and the ENVELOPE tenantId is null — but the PAYLOAD still carries the new tenant's id in `tenantId` (the multi-tenancy mandate: every payload carries tenantId). Matches the typed TenantCreatedPayloadSchema.
x-consumers: billing-service (seed TenantPlanCache with the new tenant's plan)

tenantId.description: The new tenant's id. Carried in the payload even though the envelope tenantId is null for this platform-scoped event.

createdByUserId.description: Creating user, or null (self-serve signups create the tenant before the first user exists).
